---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero}

# Alejandra Martínez

Assistant Professor
Department of Basic Sciences
National University of Luján

Researcher at CONICET

Argentina

:::

My research focuses on **robust statistics**, **semiparametric models**, **variable selection**, and **statistical learning**.

Welcome to my academic website. Here you will find information about my research, teaching, software, and freely available educational resources.

::: {.social-links}

[GitHub](https://github.com/alemermartinez)

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1893-2039)

[Email](mailto:ammartinez@conicet.gov.ar)

:::
